concerns.text: FR-001 (ingest/harmonize GSS 2022 + Cyberbullying Survey) and US-1 (Synthetic Cohort) have NO matching tasks. Tasks T012-T016 only implement single-dataset ingestion. The plan explicitly rejects the spec's core methodology, leaving FR-001, FR-002, and US-1 unimplemented.
SC-001 (covariate balance check ≤ 0.1) has NO matching task. Since the synthetic cohort creation (FR-002) is not implemented, the balance check required by SC-001 is missing entirely.

FR-002 (align demographics via weighting/matching) has NO matching task. The tasks implement a single-dataset cohort (T014) but lack any logic for propensity score matching or demographic weighting between two datasets.

Task T016 saves a 'synthetic cohort' but the implementation logic (single-dataset) does not create one. This is a terminological mismatch where the task description implies a methodology (matching) that is not present in the code plan.
